hero.title: Study in Saudi Arabia and UAE

hero.grantssubtitle: What Saudi Arabia and UAE offer

about.title: A trusted partner for students
about.description: Since 2022, Ansor Edu has been helping students gain admission to prestigious universities in Saudi Arabia on a fully-funded scholarship basis.
about.description2: Since 2022, Ansor Edu has been helping young people gain admission to Saudi Arabian universities through full scholarships. Our team is ready to turn your dream into reality. Our goal is to provide talented youth with the opportunity to receive free education at the world's most prestigious Islamic and modern universities.
about.point5: Full support from visa application to university enrollment

card.title: Reliability
card.text: We handle every document with the utmost care.
card.text1: 95% of our students are successfully admitted.
card.text2: We stay in touch with you throughout your studies.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: Comprehensive assistance for your educational journey in the Arab world.
services.s1Desc: Assistance in gathering all necessary documents for university admission.
services.s3Desc: Direct application submission to partner universities.
services.s4Desc: Guidance through the student visa application process.
services.s5Desc: Preparation for life and studies abroad.
services.s6Desc: Assistance with settling in upon arrival at your destination.
